text:
is a special series that recaps the first three seasons and the first two parts of the final season of the Attack on Titan anime.

Originally, the series consisted of six episodes and three extra editions and was aired in Japan from October 24 to December 12, 2021 on . NHK rebroadcast the six episodes on January 6 and January 7, 2022, days before the premiere of Episode 76. A second rebroadcast, featuring a new, seventh episode, aired from February 25 to February 27, 2023.

Overview

The special series recaps the whole anime prior to The Final Season Part 3.

Episodes

Six episodes of the series and three extras were aired from October 24, 2021 to December 12, 2021 on in Japan. A seventh episode aired on February 27, 2023 as part of a rebroadcast.
